title: The UiPath Platform™ for Business Orchestration and Automation | UiPath
full_text:
The UiPath Platform™ for Business Orchestration and Automation | UiPath FUSION is coming.
FUSION is coming. days hours minutes
Register now
Accelerate your journey from AI investment to enterprise impact.
See first-hand how to move from AI pilot to production, and start realizing the promise of the agentic enterprise.
Register now
See the agenda
Not sure where to start? Find out how to agentify any enterprise:
Financial Services
Healthcare
Manufacturing
Public Sector
Latest from UiPath
Press Release
UiPath has been named a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Document Mining And Analytics Platforms
Press release
UiPath achieves AIUC-1 certification, setting new standard for AI agent security and reliability
Event
Catch up on the new portfolio of industry solutions unveiled at the UiPath Agentic AI Summit
Press Release
UiPath acquires WorkFusion, strengthening agentic solutions for financial services
Release
Explore the UiPath 2025.10 release, bringing orchestration, AI, and governance together
High-impact solutions, powered by agentic automation
Banking & finance
Healthcare
Insurance
Public sector
Manufacturing
See all solutions
Banking & finance
Clients, onboarded. Loans, originated. Trade exceptions, resolved.
From onboarding to exception handling, agents and robots clear the path—so your teams can focus on impact, not inefficiency.
Agentic solutions in banking & financial services
Discover how WEX saved $2.7M by streamlining operations with automation and agentic AI
Healthcare
Claims processed. Care gaps, closed. Referrals streamlined.
The administrative burden is high in healthcare. Eliminate it for staff and patients with agentic automation.
Agentic solutions in healthcare
AGS Health revolutionizes operations with AI and machine learning
Insurance
Claims, initiated. Policies, ingested. Underwriting, streamlined.
Refocus on client relationships, product innovation, and increasing value across the insurance lifecycle with agentic automation.
Agentic solutions in insurance
See how HUB radically streamlined operations across multiple lines of business with AI and automation
Public sector
Redundancy eliminated. Workflows optimized. FedRamp authorized.
Redefine what’s possible for critical governmental agencies by harnessing the power of AI, document processing, and robots to agentify your workflows.
Agentic solutions in public sector
From 27 days to 12 hours— learn how the U.S. Department of Veteran Affairs reinvented claims processing
Manufacturing
Nearshoring, tariffs, decarbonization, smart factory; agentified.
Free up resources, increase throughput, and agentify your entire operation to adjust to market trends.
Agentic solutions in manufacturing
Discover how Arçelik is accelerating end-to-end global process digitalization with automation
High-impact solutions, powered by agentic automation
Banking & finance
Healthcare
Insurance
Public sector
Manufacturing
See all solutions
Banking & finance
Clients, onboarded. Loans, originated. Trade exceptions, resolved.
From onboarding to exception handling, agents and robots clear the path—so your teams can focus on impact, not inefficiency.
Agentic solutions in banking & financial services
Healthcare
Claims processed. Care gaps, closed. Referrals streamlined.
The administrative burden is high in healthcare. Eliminate it for staff and patients with agentic automation.
Agentic solutions in healthcare
Insurance
Claims, initiated. Policies, ingested. Underwriting, streamlined.
Refocus on client relationships, product innovation, and increasing value across the insurance lifecycle with agentic automation.
Agentic solutions in insurance
Public sector
Redundancy eliminated. Workflows optimized. FedRamp authorized.
Redefine what’s possible for critical governmental agencies by harnessing the power of AI, document processing, and robots to agentify your workflows.
Agentic solutions in public sector
Manufacturing
Nearshoring, tariffs, decarbonization, smart factory; agentified.
Free up resources, increase throughput, and agentify your entire operation to adjust to market trends.
Agentic solutions in manufacturing
Agentic AI meets ROI
Orchestrate complex workflows with the open and trusted platform for agentic
automation where agents think, robots do, people lead.
AI process transformation
Agentify end-to-end processes with an open, flexible, and interoperable architecture
Build and integrate UiPath agents, third-party agents, UI automations, and API-based workflows
Time to value
Enable fast prototyping and collaboration for quick outcome validation and eventual deployment
Empower business owners, low-code users, developers, and IT teams to co-create
Trust & governance
Fine-grained governance; role-based access, real-time monitoring, compliance controls
Get audits and guardrails that de-risk AI adoption and tame agent, application, and tool sprawl
Explore the UiPath Platform and start building
Explore the platform
Start building
Gallery of Customer Achievement
Omega Healthcare
With a steady stream of claims, Omega Healthcare turned to UiPath for relief. The result? 100% increase in productivity and 50% faster turnaround on invoices.
Watch the video
Gallery of Customer Achievement
Johnson Controls
Johnson Controls was feeling the pressure of 6,500 daily invoices. See how automation helped cool things down—saving $18 million and 900,000 hours.
Watch the video
Gallery of Customer Achievement
Canon
At Canon, efficiency was going down as paperwork was piling up. Discover how 135 UiPath robots came to the rescue.
Watch the video
Gallery of Customer Achievement
EY
A firm that strategizes for clients needed a strategy of its own. UiPath helped EY expand from 5 to 500 robots in 18 months.
Watch the video
Gallery of Customer Achievement
VITAL
When processing payroll, automation really pays off. UiPath helped VITAL serve 450% more agencies, while saving 15,000 work hours.
Watch the video
Gallery of Customer Achievement
TQL
When faced with 33,000 decisions a day, TQL made one very smart decision. They partnered with UiPath to merge human service with automation.
Get the full story
Gallery of Customer Achievement
Uber
Uber was having trouble keeping up with its own growth. Thanks to automation, Uber is back on the fast track, on pace to save $22 million. See how they turned it around.
Watch the video
Gallery of Customer Achievement
Generali
Generali is saving millions of euros and improving lives with UiPath automation. Watch the full story, and see why automation has become “insurance for insurance companies.”
Watch the video
Gallery of Customer Achievement
Xerox
The company that changed how the world manages documents needed automation to help with its own documents. Watch how Xerox is changing the world—again.
Watch the video
Gallery of Customer Achievement
Dentsu
For dentsu, a global ad agency, paperwork took time away from creating ideas. Then they came up with a great idea: automation. See how it’s now saving them more than 125,000 hours.
Watch the video
Gallery of Customer Achievement
NYPCC
Automation can lead to more compassion. Here’s the surprising story of how the UiPath Bridge program is helping NYPCC meet the mental health needs of underserved communities.
Watch the video
